node.text:
Eid mubarak from my family!✨

Styled by @parsaistudio
This reminds me of my parents so much, when we used to celebrate Eid together, may Allah bless them ❤️
@fasihlization bs kr dein laiba ny sb k comm like kiye but apka nai😂
